[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01000000 1
1 00000000 a
2 00000001 1
3 11110000 4
4 01110000 3
5 01011100 4
6 00010000 1
7 00000000 a

01 10 00000000 a match 1 7
12 21 10010000 2
23 32 01110000 3 match 4
34 43 01011100 4 match 5
45 54 00010000 1 match 6
56 65 00000000 a match 1 7
67 76 01100000 2
70 07 00000000 a match 1 7

13 31 00011000 2
24 42 11010000 3
35 53 00010010 2
46 64 01000000 1 match 0
57 75 00000000 a match 1 7
60 06 00000000 a match 1 7
71 17 10000000 1

03 30 00000000 a match 1 7
14 41 10011000 3
25 52 00010000 1 match 6
36 63 01100000 2
47 74 11000100 3
50 05 00000000 a match 1 7
61 16 00000001 1 match 2
72 27 11100000 3

04 40 00000000 a match 1 7
15 51 00010000 1 match 6
26 62 01100000 2
37 73 01100100 3
